title: astragalus crispocarpus
intro: Astragalus crispocarpus, also known as the shrubby milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, and is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Astragalus crispocarpus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its possible role in reducing stress and anxiety. Astragalus crispocarpus is commonly prepared as a dried root extract, capsule, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
